title: Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple is a temple in India, dedicated to Shiva as kirata (hunter).
overview.description: Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple is a temple in India, dedicated to Shiva as kirata (hunter). This temple's specialty is that the deity give dharshan to the western side. This temple is situated in Manjapra village in Ernakulam District of the Indian state of Kerala. The deity of Siva is in the Sankalppa of Kirathamoorthy that is Vettakkaran.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manjapra
topPlaces.description: Manjapra is a village in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located about 10 km from Angamaly and 6 km from Kalady.

topPlaces.name: Puthoorppilly Sree Krishnaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Puthoorppilly Sreekrishna temple is located at Manjapra, a small village in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. This temple is a protected monument by Archeological Department, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Naduvattam (Ernakulam)
topPlaces.description: Naduvattam is a small village situated in Ernakulam district, Kerala state, south India. It is situated about 12 km from Angamaly and 5 km from Kalady.

topPlaces.name: Neeleeswaram

topPlaces.name: Kottamam
topPlaces.description: Kottamam is a city situated in the banks of the holy river Periyar in Ernakulam district, Kerala state, south India. It is situated about 9.5 km from Angamaly and 3 km from Kalady, the birthplace of Adi Sankaracharya.

topPlaces.name: Thuravoor, Angamaly
topPlaces.description: Thuravoor is a Gram Panchayat in Aluva Taluk of Ernakulam District in the South Indian state of Kerala. Thuravoor Grama Panchayath is nearly 5 km from Angamaly Town.

topPlaces.name: Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva is situated on the banks of the Periyar river at Kalady of Ernakulam District in Kerala state in India. The Cheranalloor Mahadeva Temple is one of the important temples in Cochin Kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Cheranallur
topPlaces.description: Cheranallur is a suburb of Kochi city in the state of Kerala, India and lies on the banks of the Periyar River. According to tradition, the area was named by its earlier inhabitants who found this place very fertile and beautiful.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karppillikkavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manjapra, Puthoorppilly Sree Krishnaswamy Temple, Naduvattam (Ernakulam), Neeleeswaram, Kottamam.
